title: YouTube finally lets you turn off Shorts: Chec out exact settings to clean up your feed
snippet: YouTube now allows users to completely remove Shorts videos from the app, a feature added in 2020. This option is part of the Shorts Feed Limit feature which was first introduced last year.

title: Google brings the Gemini app to Mac, Sundar Pichai says it was built by AI
snippet: Google has released the Gemini app for Mac, allowing users to access its AI assistant via a keyboard shortcut and share screens for contextual help. The app was built by Google's own AI coding tool Antigravity, Sundar Pichai revealed

title: EU threatens to force Meta to restore WhatsApp full access for rival AI chatbots
snippet: EU threatens to force Meta to restore WhatsApp full access for rival AI chatbots

title: ChatGPT, Gemini and Grok confidently generate dangerous medical advice half the time, study finds
snippet: A study in BMJ Open reveals that around 50% of medical advice from popular AI chatbots is inaccurate. The research tested five platforms and found significant issues with open-ended queries.

title: Gujarat HC issues notices to Meta, X, Google over PIL seeking curb on misuse of AI
snippet: Gujarat HC issues notices to Meta, X, Google over PIL seeking curb on misuse of AI

title: Oppo F33, F33 Pro with 6.57-inch AMOLED display and 7,000mAh battery launched in India: Price, specs and features
snippet: OPPO has launched the F33 5G and F33 Pro 5G in India, featuring a 7000mAh battery, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 MAX processor, and military-grade durability. Prices start from  ₹31,999

title: Vivo T5 Pro 5G with Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 SoC and 9,020mAh battery launched in India, price starts at…
snippet: Vivo has launched the T5 Pro 5G &nbsp;featuring a 9020mAh battery, Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, and military-grade durability. The phone start at a price of  ₹29,999.&nbsp;

title: Over 100 Chrome extensions caught stealing Google and Telegram data: How to stay safe?
snippet: Cybersecurity experts have reported a coordinated attack involving 108 Google Chrome extensions that steal user data and hijack Telegram sessions. Researchers say these extensions have been installed approximately 20,000 times&nbsp;

title: Apple found X and Grok apps in ‘violation’ of App Store guidelines, demanded immediate changes: Report
snippet: Apple threatened to remove the Grok app from its App Store after users created sexualized deepfakes. The new details were uncovered in a letter by the company &nbsp;to US senators.&nbsp;

title: Google brings Personal Intelligence to India, to let Gemini access your emails and photos: Here's how to set it up
snippet: Google's Personal Intelligence feature is now available in India. the feature allows users to &nbsp;connect Gemini with other apps for tailored answers.&nbsp;

title: Musk's staff reaches out to suppliers for Terafab project: Report
snippet: Elon ​Musk's staff ​have reached out to ‌chip ⁠industry ⁠suppliers ​including Applied Materials, Tokyo ​Electron and ​Lam Research ⁠for ‌his ​Terafab ​AI ⁠chip complex project with ​SpaceX and ​Tesla.

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman seeks dismissal of sister's punitive damages claims in sexual abuse lawsuit
snippet: Annie Altman accused her brother of ⁠sexually abusing and ‌raping her between 1997 and 2006 at the family ​home in ​suburban Clayton, Missouri, starting when she was three and ⁠he was 12. She said the "last acts of sexual ​abuse and rape" occurred when Sam Altman was an ​adult. He is now 40.

title: Can AI fix your credit score? Krutrim shuts down assistant Kruti
snippet: Happy Thursday! Fintechs are building AI solutions to help boost the creditworthiness of borrowers. This and more in today’s ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Wipro bags Alpha Net client contracts in $71-million deal
snippet: The acquisition will give Wipro access to a set of key clients, customer contracts and related employees from Alpha Net Group. The deal also includes deferred earnout-linked payments tied to performance conditions and is expected to close by June 30, 2026.

title: Ola's AI smart assistant 'Kruti' goes dark across app platforms
snippet: While 'Kruti' was not accessible via its direct website, kruti.ai, which showed a "site not found" error, users accessing it through Olakrutrim.com/kruti saw a message stating the site was under maintenance and would be back shortly.

title: Industrial AI startup Intellithink raises Rs 17 crore in round led by Pentathlon Ventures
snippet: Anicut Capital and Veltis Capital participated in the round. The Bengaluru-based industrial AI startup serves over 50 enterprises, including Jindal Steel, Jindal Stainless, JSW Steel, ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel, Adani, Ultratech, Dalmia, Ducab, and L&T, and is expanding in international markets.

title: The problem with thinking you’re part Neanderthal
